zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie於1244年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill32歲，母親Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia40歲。他於1265年與Joan MacDougall在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie于1244年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill32岁，母亲Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia40岁。他于1265年与Joan MacDougall在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie was born in 1244, in Scotland, his father, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, was 32 and his mother, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, was 40. He married Joan MacDougall in 1265, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1320, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie est né en 1244, à Écosse, son père, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan MacDougall en 1265, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1320, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie 1244 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill 32 und seine Mutter Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia 40. Er hat 1265 in Schottland, United Kingdom Joan MacDougall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie è nato il nel 1244 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan MacDougall nel 1265, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1320, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie(이)가 1244년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1265년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Joan MacDougall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie nasceu em 1244, em Scotland, seu pai, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan MacDougall em 1265, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1320, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie родился в 1244 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan MacDougall в 1265 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1320 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan MacDougall 6th of Dunollie nació en 1244, en Scotland, su papá, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Joan MacDougall en 1265, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1320, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
